mapper.insert: /* PotholeImageMapper.insertPotholeImage - 포트홀 이미지 insert */ INSERT INTO pothole_photo ( report_no, photo_gb, img_path, img_name, sort_ord, is_main ) VALUES ( #{reportNo}, #{photoGb}, #{imgPath}, #{imgName}, #{sortOrd}, #{isMain} )
mapper.select: SELECT img_path AS imgPath, img_name AS imgName, sort_ord AS sortOrd, photo_gb AS photoGb, is_main AS isMain FROM pothole_photo WHERE report_no = #{reportNo} AND photo_gb = #{photoGb} ORDER BY sort_ord ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pothole_photo (report_no, photo_gb, img_path, img_name, sort_ord, is_main) VALUES (#{reportNo}, #{photoGb}, #{imgPath}, #{imgName}, #{sortOrd}, #{isMain}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE img_path = VALUES(img_path), img_name = VALUES(img_name), is_main = VALUES(is_main)
